description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house set on a rectangular green plot with a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The structure features clean, geometric lines and a mix of white and gray exterior surfaces, with large windows and open terraces visible on multiple sides. The rear of the house includes a patio area and a small pool, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level partially cantilevered over the lower, creating shaded outdoor spaces. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with large glass panels providing ample natural light and views. The entryway is defined by a wide, paved approach and a recessed doorway, emphasizing a minimalist, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of white and gray surfaces, set on a green plot with a driveway and backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway, and minimalist facade with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cantilevered upper story, backyard pool, and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio, and extensive glass surfaces on the lower level.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wall sections, window placements, and the overall linear form of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Wide paved approach with a recessed, minimalist doorway and no porch or decorative columns
